name: Crispy Potato Veggies
recipeIngredient: 2 cups carrots, cut into 1/4 inch strips
2 cups zucchini, cut into 1/2 inch strips
2 cups bell peppers, cut into 1/2 inch strips
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. Mix the potato flakes, parmesan cheese, garlic powder, and basil in a large bowl.
3. Beat the egg whites until frothy.
4. Dip each vegetable into the beaten egg, then coat with the potato and cheese mixture, turning to ensure even coverage.
5. Place the coated vegetables on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper or foil.
6. Bake for 10-12 minutes, or until lightly browned and crispy.
